vocab.example: Our tax accountant reviews all invoices before the deadline.
vocab.example_vi: Kế toán thuế của chúng tôi kiểm tra hết hóa đơn trước hạn chót.

vocab.example: We need to file the tax return by the end of the month.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng ta cần nộp tờ khai thuế trước cuối tháng.

vocab.example: Is this business trip deductible from our taxes?
vocab.example_vi: Chuyến công tác này có được khấu trừ thuế không?

vocab.example: Don't forget to add VAT to the invoice.
vocab.example_vi: Đừng quên cộng thuế giá trị gia tăng vào hóa đơn.

vocab.example: Our fiscal year ends in December.
vocab.example_vi: Năm tài chính của chúng tôi kết thúc vào tháng Mười Hai.

vocab.example: Please provide your company's tax code for the report.
vocab.example_vi: Vui lòng cung cấp mã số thuế công ty bạn cho báo cáo.

vocab.example: Late filing may result in a penalty from the tax office.
vocab.example_vi: Nộp trễ có thể bị cơ quan thuế phạt.

vocab.example: This item qualifies for a tax exemption this year.
vocab.example_vi: Mục này đủ điều kiện được miễn thuế năm nay.

lines.speaker: Minh (finance staff)
lines.text: Hằng, can we go over our tax return before the deadline?

lines.speaker: Hằng (tax accountant)
lines.text: Sure, Minh. Let's check if everything is ready to file.

lines.speaker: Minh (finance staff)
lines.text: Are the travel expenses from last quarter deductible?

lines.speaker: Hằng (tax accountant)
lines.text: Most of them are deductible, but we need proper receipts.

lines.speaker: Minh (finance staff)
lines.text: Okay, I'll collect the receipts. What about the VAT on this invoice?

lines.speaker: Hằng (tax accountant)
lines.text: The VAT looks correct, but double-check the supplier's tax code.

lines.speaker: Minh (finance staff)
lines.text: Got it. When exactly does our fiscal year end?

lines.speaker: Hằng (tax accountant)
lines.text: It ends in December, so we still have some time.

lines.speaker: Minh (finance staff)
lines.text: Good. I really don't want to pay another penalty this year.

lines.speaker: Hằng (tax accountant)
lines.text: Don't worry, I'll also check if we qualify for any exemption.

questions.q: What are Minh and Hằng preparing together?
What does Hằng say the deductible expenses need?
What does Minh want to avoid this year?

shadowing: Can we go over our tax return before the deadline please?
Most of these travel expenses are deductible with proper receipts.
Please double-check the supplier's tax code on this new invoice.
Our fiscal year ends in December, so we have some time.
I really don't want to pay another penalty this year.
